## 📋 Task Description

A clear description of the task to be completed.

## 🎯 Objective

What is the goal of this task? What should be accomplished?

- [ ] Subtask 1
- [ ] Subtask 2
- [ ] Subtask 3

List the files that will be created or modified:

- `src/file1.c`
- `inc/file1.h`
- Other files...

- Related to #issue_number
- Depends on #issue_number
- Blocks #issue_number

## ✅ Definition of Done

Clear criteria for when this task is complete:

- [ ] Code implemented and follows Norminette
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No memory leaks (valgrind clean)
- [ ] Tested with various inputs

- [ ] Test case 1
- [ ] Test case 2
- [ ] Edge cases handled
